mapper.select:
SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.track_id, a.track_nm, f.artist_id reqArtistId, f.artist_nm reqArtsitNm, a.agency_id, b.album_id, e.artist_id, e.artist_nm, c.album_img_size size, CONCAT(c.album_img_url,'?updateDate=',UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.update_dtime)) url, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, a.track_cnt trackCount, a.img_size, a.img_url, a.track_sn, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime, a.trackRenewDtime, a.rank FROM ( SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.track_id, a.track_nm, a.agency_id, a.album_id, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, a.track_cnt, a.track_sn, a.reprsnt_artist_id, a.img_size, a.img_url, a.trackCreateDtime trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime trackUpdateDtime, a.trackRenewDtime trackRenewDtime, @curRank:=IF(@prevChnlId = a.chnl_id,@curRank + 1,1) AS rank, @prevChnlId:=a.chnl_id FROM ( SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.chnl_nm, a.track_cnt, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, b.img_size, b.img_url, d.track_id, d.track_nm, d.agency_id, d.album_id, d.reprsnt_artist_id, d.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, d.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime, c.create_dtime trackRenewDtime, c.track_sn FROM tb_chnl a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_img_mang b ON a.chnl_id = b.img_content_id INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track c ON a.chnl_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track d ON c.track_id = d.track_id WHERE a.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND b.img_content_type = 'CHNL' AND b.os_type = #{osType} AND b.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND a.chnl_id IN
#{channelId}
AND d.disp_status_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY FIELD(a.chnl_id,
#{channelId} ) , c.track_sn ASC ) a ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_album b ON a.album_id = b.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist d ON a.track_id =d.track_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON d.artist_id = e.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist f ON f.artist_id = a.reprsnt_artist_id , (SELECT @curRank:=0, @prevChnlId:=0) r WHERE a.rank <= #{trackLimitSize} AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y'

SELECT chnl_id FROM ( SELECT a.chnl_id, b.disp_sn, c.category_id FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN ( SELECT b.music_content_id, b.disp_sn FROM tb_chart a INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_img_mang c ON b.music_content_id = c.img_content_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'ALL' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND c.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND c.img_content_type='CHNL' ) b ON a.chnl_id = b.music_content_id INNER JOIN tb_map_category_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_category d ON c.category_id = d.category_id WHERE a.disp_status_type = 'Y' GROUP BY a.chnl_id ORDER BY b.disp_sn ) a WHERE category_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY disp_sn

SELECT a.svc_genre_id, a.prefer_genre_id, b.chart_id, c.music_content_id chnl_id, c.disp_sn FROM ( SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, @curRank:=IF(@prevChnlId = prefer_genre_id, @curRank + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevChnlId:=prefer_genre_id FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre, (SELECT @curRank:=0, @prevChnlId:=0) r ORDER BY prefer_genre_id , disp_sn ) a INNER JOIN tb_chart b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content c ON b.chart_id = c.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_img_mang d ON c.music_content_id = d.img_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl e ON d.img_content_id = e.chnl_id WHERE b.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND b.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND b.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND d.img_content_type = 'CHNL' AND d.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND d.img_disp_type = 'DEFAULT' AND e.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND a.rank <= 1 GROUP BY a.svc_genre_id , a.prefer_genre_id , b.chart_id , c.disp_sn ORDER BY b.chart_id , c.disp_sn

SELECT category.category_id, b.music_content_id chnl_id, b.disp_sn FROM ( SELECT category_id FROM tb_category WHERE category_type = 'MOOD' AND disp_status_type = 'Y' ) category INNER JOIN tb_chart a ON category.category_id = a.svc_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_img_mang d ON c.chnl_id = d.img_content_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'MOOD' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND c.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND d.img_content_type = 'CHNL' AND d.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND d.img_disp_type = 'DEFAULT' GROUP BY category.category_id , a.chart_id, b.disp_sn ORDER BY a.chart_id , b.disp_sn

( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.member_chnl_nm as content_title, b.track_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.album_img_size as size, CONCAT(d.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.update_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_member_chnl b ON a.listen_type_id = b.member_chnl_id AND a.member_no = b.member_no AND a.listen_type = 'MY_CHNL' LEFT JOIN ted_album c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chart_disp_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, f.album_img_size AS size, CONCAT(f.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(f.update_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_chart b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' LEFT JOIN tb_chart_music_content c ON b.chart_id = c.chart_id AND c.disp_sn = 1 LEFT JOIN ted_track d ON c.music_content_id = d.track_id LEFT JOIN ted_album e ON d.album_id = e.album_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img f ON e.album_id = f.album_id )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, 'Like You' AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, c.url FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_SML_TR' JOIN (SELECT img_size AS size, img_url AS url FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_SML_TR' AND dfk_type = #{dayType} AND os_type = #{osType} LIMIT 1 ) c ON 1=1 )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, 'Mix Tape' AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, c.url FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_GR_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_size AS size, img_url AS url FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_GR_TR' AND dfk_type = #{dayType} AND os_type = #{osType} LIMIT 1 ) c ON 1=1 )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, 'Musician Focus' AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_list WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, c.url FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_ATST_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_size AS size, img_url AS url FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_ATST_TR' AND dfk_type = #{dayType} AND os_type = #{osType} LIMIT 1 ) c ON 1=1 )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, 'Made for U' AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, c.url FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_CF_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_size AS size, img_url AS url FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_CF_TR' AND dfk_type = #{dayType} AND os_type = #{osType} LIMIT 1 ) c ON 1=1 )
ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC

SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chnl_nm as content_title, b.track_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.album_img_size as size, CONCAT(d.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.update_dtime)) AS url, b.renew_dtime FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN tb_chnl b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chnl_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHNL' LEFT JOIN ted_album c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id
